zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Boston於1541年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛可利時，她的父親John Boston13歲，母親Bridget11歲。她於1567年與Henry Griggs在英國素福爾可波泰德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1599年在英國英格蘭素福爾可波泰德享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Boston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the place so named in Lincolnshire, which means ‘Bōtwulf's stone’ (from the Old English personal name Bōtwulf + Old English stān ‘stone’). This has been considered to refer to Saint Botulf, and to be the site of the monastery that he built in the 7th century, but it is more likely that the Bōtwulf of the placename was an ordinary landowner, and that the association with the saint was a later development because of the name.
Americanized form of German   Basten   or   Bastian   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Basten
meanings: German and Dutch (Gelderland and Limburg): patronymic from the personal name   Bast  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Boston was born in 1541, in Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Boston, was 13 and her mother, Bridget, was 11. She married Henry Griggs in 1567, in Boxted, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1599, in Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Hartest with Boxted, Babergh District, S: Hartest with Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Boston est née en 1541, à Brockley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Boston, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Bridget, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Griggs en 1567, à Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1599, à Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Hartest with Boxted, Babergh District, S: Hartest with Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Boston 1541 in Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Boston 13 und ihre Mutter Bridget 11. Sie hat 1567 in Boxted, Suffolk, England Henry Griggs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1599 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Henry Griggs nel 1567, nel Boxted, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ko.Hartest with Boxted, Babergh District, S: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트 위스 보스테드
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Boston(이)가 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브록리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Boston(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bridget(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1567년 영국 수폴크 보스테드에서 Henry Griggs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보스테드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보스테드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Henry Griggs em 1567, em Boxted, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.Hartest with Boxted, Babergh District, S: хартест вит бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Boston родилась в 1541 г. в местности броккли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Boston было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Griggs в 1567 г. в местности бокстед, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1599 г. в местности бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
